title: Key numbers on Canadian immigration - Canada.ca
content:
## Key numbers on Canadian immigration
Canada’s immigration system has long been a source of pride for Canadians and an economic driver. We are restoring balance to the system and reducing immigration levels to stabilize population growth and take pressure off essential services and infrastructure.

## Students and temporary workers
Information on the total population of students and workers in Canada
Monthly data on asylum claimants at a border crossing, in Canada and between ports of entry

## IRCC’s application inventories
Information on how many applications are within or exceeding our service standards, as well as how many we’ve processed.
